<ContentPage
  eyebrow="Standard Library"
  title="std.env"
  description="Environment variables and current directory."
>
  ## Module overview

  Read and write environment variables and inspect the current working directory.

  <CodeCard title="Import and use" language="tea">
    {`use env = "std.env"

const root = env.cwd()
const home = env.get("HOME")`}
  </CodeCard>

  <StdlibFunctionPanel sourcePath="stdlib/env/mod.tea" />
</ContentPage>
